overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded assassin character exploring an ancient Egyptian riverside settlement. The character walks along wooden walkways, wades through a canal with lily pads, and explores village areas with mud-brick buildings and palm trees on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway transitioning to open dock

events.description: exits covered walkway with fabric canopy into open waterfront dock area

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden planks under a fabric canopy, emerging onto an open dock overlooking the water

entered.detail: fabric and wood canopy covering the walkway
ancient Egyptian style mud-brick structures with flat roofs
greenish water canal with vegetation along the banks
tall palm trees lining the water's edge
thick tree trunk with textured bark beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden walkway with fabric canopies, transitioning to an open dock area overlooking a water canal. The character walks forward along wooden planks, passing mud-brick walls and palm trees as they emerge from the sheltered passage into bright sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock, looking out over the water with lily pads and papyrus reeds

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a dock over the water
large green lily pads floating on the water surface
tall green papyrus plants growing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The character explores an open wooden dock extending over a water canal filled with lily pads and papyrus reeds. Mud-brick buildings line the far bank under a bright sun, while the camera moves forward along the weathered planks toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water canal with wooden walkways

events.description: character steps off wooden dock into shallow water
character exits water and climbs back onto wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow green water with lily pads, then climbing onto a wooden walkway covered with rugs

entered.detail: wooden walkway covered with red and blue patterned rugs
hanging fabric shade structure over the walkway
simple wooden stick fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character steps down from the dock into the shallow water canal, wading through greenish water with lily pads and wooden posts. After a brief walk through the water, the character climbs back onto a wooden walkway adorned with rugs and covered by fabric canopies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway leading to village square

events.description: descends from elevated walkway into open village square with stone paving

agents.ego_description: ascending wooden stairs and walking along elevated path, then entering a village square with other villagers present

notable_agents.action: villager in white robes walking away from the camera toward the buildings

entered.detail: wooden steps leading up to elevated walkway
open village square with irregular stone paving
mud-brick building with orange fabric awning and wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs to an elevated walkway lined with fences, overlooking the water canal below. Descending into an open village square with stone paving, the character passes mud-brick buildings with fabric awnings while a villager walks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path with animal carcass

events.description: character passes large dead hippopotamus carcass lying on wooden planks

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow village pathways, passing a large dead hippopotamus lying beside the path

entered.detail: large pinkish-gray hippopotamus carcass lying on its side on wooden planks
buildings with straw thatched roofs visible in the distance
large ceramic storage jars with decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking through narrow village passages with mud-brick walls, the character passes a large dead hippopotamus carcass lying on wooden planks. The path continues past pottery jars and toward thatched-roof structures in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking through rural outskirts with scattered thatched huts and wooden scaffolding, heading toward open landscape

entered.detail: small structure with straw thatched roof and mud walls
rough wooden scaffolding and storage racks
ancient pyramid visible on the horizon beyond the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a more rural area with dirt paths, passing thatched huts and wooden scaffolding. The environment opens up to reveal distant pyramids on the horizon beyond palm trees, transitioning from the dense village to the outskirts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered corridors of a riverside settlement into an expansive rural landscape with distant monuments. It begins under fabric canopies on a wooden walkway, moving forward as the shelter gives way to a bright, open dock overlooking a canal filled with lily pads and papyrus reeds. The camera then follows the character as they wade through the shallow greenish water before climbing back onto elevated walkways and descending into a stone-paved village square lined with mud-brick buildings. As the path narrows through village passages, the scene passes a dead hippopotamus carcass and various pottery jars before shifting toward the outskirts. Finally, the environment opens up into a rural area of dirt paths and thatched huts, revealing the pyramids on the horizon beyond a grove of palm trees.
